meta.title: Forest Narratives Studio
meta.description: Forest Narratives Studio. Interactive stories and visual novels.

paragraphs: Somewhere on the Internet you stumble upon Forest Narratives—an independent studio that tells interactive stories.
The name sounds familiar: maybe you already played Strange House, a text-based horror quest on RuStore for Android.
Right now the studio is hard at work on the visual novel The Last Warm Day.
adventure.question: What do you do next?

meta.title: Strange House — Forest Narratives Studio
meta.description: Strange House is an interactive fiction story where every decision changes the path ahead.
meta.ogImageAlt: Strange House — promotional art for the game

strangeHouse.title: STRANGE HOUSE

dialogue.visitorLine: What kind of game is Strange House?
dialogue.studioLine: Curious? Then settle in, and I'll tell you the story.

images.interiorAlt: Strange House atmospheric scene inside the house
images.roadAlt: Strange House atmospheric scene on the road

paragraphs: “These are troubled lands. I wouldn’t go wandering here for no reason.” Igor checked the front-door lock once more, then returned to the table. “After dark, I try not to step outside without a rifle. Truth be told, even with one I’d rather stay put till sunrise. So what brings you here? It’s a long night. Talk, and I’ll listen.”

Strange House is interactive fiction: a story that moves only by your choices. Will your path be long or cut short? Will you find common ground with those you meet—or make enemies? Happy ending, bitter one, or tragedy? It’s all on you, one decision at a time.
The game is available for Android smartphones (version 6 and above).
